era_context: Middle Bronze Age; Old Babylonian period; Hittite consolidation; Indus Valley decline; Egypt approaching Second Intermediate Period.
disconfirming_evidence: No specific events are attested for this year.
historiographic_note: Chronological uncertainty dominates this period. Absolute dating of events in Mesopotamia, Egypt, and the Levant relies on competing chronological systems that can differ by a century or more. Year-specific documentation is essentially non-existent for the ancient world at this time.
